items.question: Why is AI not recommending my business?
items.answer: AI may skip your business when it cannot verify your entity, services, location, proof, and trust signals. Dubai businesses need structured content, schema, FAQs, internal links, and credible mentions to become recommendation-ready.

items.question: Why is ChatGPT not recommending my Dubai business?
items.answer: ChatGPT may skip your Dubai business if your website lacks clear entity data, service proof, FAQ answers, and local authority signals. AI engines need structured evidence before they recommend a brand.

items.question: What is GEO for UAE businesses?
items.answer: GEO is Generative Engine Optimization for AI-generated answers. It helps UAE businesses become understandable, citable, and recommendable across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Bing Copilot, and Google AI results.

items.question: What is the difference between AEO and GEO?
items.answer: AEO structures direct answers for answer engines, while GEO helps a brand appear in generated recommendations. UAE businesses need both because AI systems extract answers and also compare providers.

items.question: Does schema markup help AI recommend a company?
items.answer: Schema markup helps AI systems interpret the business, service, location, FAQs, and page relationships. It works best when the visible content also supports the same claims.

items.question: Which pages matter most for AI visibility in Dubai?
items.answer: The most important pages are the homepage, service pages, location pages, case studies, FAQs, and knowledge hub articles. Together they create the entity graph AI systems need.

items.question: Do reviews affect AI visibility?
items.answer: Reviews can support digital trust when they are consistent with the business profile and service evidence. AI systems may use review signals as one trust indicator, but reviews cannot replace clear website architecture.

items.question: How can a business appear in Google AI Overviews?
items.answer: A business improves its chances by publishing answer-led content, structured data, topical depth, and trusted proof. Google AI visibility is not guaranteed, so the goal is to reduce ambiguity and strengthen citation readiness.

items.question: How does Perplexity choose businesses to cite?
items.answer: Perplexity favors sources it can retrieve, summarize, and cite clearly. Businesses need crawlable pages, direct answers, strong entities, and supporting evidence.

items.question: What is entity consistency?
items.answer: Entity consistency means the same business name, services, locations, founder information, and proof signals appear consistently across the website and external profiles. It helps AI systems avoid confusion.

items.question: What is digital trust for AI visibility?
items.answer: Digital trust is the evidence that makes a business credible online. It includes service proof, case studies, reviews, author information, policies, structured data, and clear contact routes.

items.question: Does internal linking matter for AI recommendations?
items.answer: Internal linking matters because it shows how services, entities, case studies, and knowledge assets relate. Descriptive links help AI systems understand the site graph.

items.question: Does website performance affect AI visibility?
items.answer: Performance supports crawlability, user experience, and conversion quality. A slow or unstable website can weaken the trust and usability signals around an otherwise strong business.

items.question: Do brand mentions help AI visibility?
items.answer: Relevant mentions can help when they reinforce the same entity and service positioning. Random mentions are weaker than proof-linked references from credible sources.

items.question: How much content depth does AI visibility require?
items.answer: The page should answer the buyer question fully, define entities, explain process, show proof, and link related resources. Depth matters when it is structured and useful, not padded.

items.question: Can a small Dubai business improve AI visibility?
items.answer: Yes. A smaller Dubai business can improve AI visibility by clarifying its niche, publishing strong service pages, adding FAQs, using schema, and collecting credible proof.

items.question: How long does AI visibility improvement take?
items.answer: Timelines vary because AI systems update differently. Most businesses should treat AI visibility as an ongoing infrastructure and content governance program, not a one-time campaign.

items.question: What should an AI visibility audit include?
items.answer: An audit should review entity clarity, technical foundation, schema, content depth, FAQs, internal links, reviews, mentions, authority, and conversion paths. It should end with prioritized implementation steps.

items.question: How can Vista by Lara improve AI recommendations?
items.answer: Vista by Lara improves AI recommendations by rebuilding entity architecture, AEO answers, GEO content, schema, internal links, proof nodes, and WhatsApp-ready conversion paths for UAE buyers.

items.question: What happens in a free AI Visibility Assessment?
items.answer: Vista reviews the business profile, structured data, content depth, internal links, authority signals, and priority gaps. The assessment identifies the highest-impact improvements for AI recommendation readiness.
